author: W0Nm
content: Result: crossbridge-server implemented and verified. New crate `crossbridge-server` added to workspace with modules: paths, slug, supervisor (register + exp backoff reconnect), listeners (per-peer UnixListener tasks via mpsc), handler (Submit+Answer with idempotency, footer, label set), attachment (jj workspace add → describe → forget → cleanup), run (event loop), main (CLI). 27 unit tests + 2 integration tests pass; clippy clean (-D warnings); fmt clean. shell.nix updated with jujutsu/rustfmt/clippy.
